nasb.text: So Hamor and his son Shechem came to the gate of their city and spoke to the men of their city, saying,

esv.text: So Hamor and his son Shechem came to the gate of their city and spoke to the men of their city, saying,

cnv.text: 哈抹和他兒子示劍來到自己的城的門口，對城裡的人說：

ccb.text: 哈抹父子来到城门口，对那城的居民说：

csbs.text: 于是哈抹和他儿子示剑来到城门口，告诉城里的人，说：
